title: Soccer Bot Indoor Football Trainer, Football Gifts for Boys and Girls, One Size, Black
features: FOOTBALL - Ultimate Indoor Football Solution: The Strikesphere Soccer Bot uses state-of-the-art sensors to track and tackle the ball, testing your football skills to the utmost.
SOCCER BOT - Can you avoid the bot? Use your football skills to avoid the bot! Game on!!
FOOTBALL SKILLS - 3 Speed Modes: Accommodates all skill levels, from novice to seasoned players, helping to improve your close control football skills.
FOOTBALL TRAINING EQUIPMENT FOR KIDS - In-Built LCD Score Tracker: Keeps track of your current score and records your highest achievements, turning your living room into a dynamic football arena.
FOOTBALL GAMES - Versatile Gameplay with Zone Discs: Set up your playing area for adjustable difficulty levels, perfect for solo practice or multi-player games.

INDOOR FOOTBALL - Adaptable Performance: With a simple switch, flip between standard and boost mode for optimal performance on various surfaces, including carpet. The ultimate indoor football solution.
Please insert batteries in the bot and the ball otherwise this will not work. Requires 3 x AAA & 4 x AA batteries
description: From the manufacturer Size 1 PVC Football Featuring built in sensor technology that interacts with the Bot. Compact training zone Set up your indoor training area 1.5m x 1.5m using the 4 zone discs supplied. Minimal space required. 3 Speed setting Three progressive speed modes let you customise the difficulty as your skills improve. Football indoors? Elevate your close control skills with the ultimate indoor football opponent. LCD Soccer tracker The Bot remembers your score, challenge yourself to improve or try to beat your friends. Boost mode Select standard for hard surfaces or boost mode for carpet to ensure optimal performance.
